title: Onysd Vehicles
description:
Improved and fixed version of vehicle mod.

MrCrayfish's Vehicle Mod Unofficial Continuation.
body:
Onysd Vehicles
==============

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aa6127947e167f3d00201d15e161d4534e7f566.png)

![Minecraft](https://shorturl.at/LiBIk)

👋 Hi! It's my unofficial continuation of MrCrayfish\`s Vehicle Mod.  
🏗️ Here i fixing issues, creating new content and developing new features.  
📝 I plan to mantain mod only for 1.12.2 version of Minecraft. Don\`t ask for another versions ;)  
🤯 I'm open for new ideas and suggestions, so don't afraid to contact me!


⚠️ Important: This mod requires **[Obfuscate](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/obfuscate)** library to work!

🌐 Also check original mod from MrCrayfish **[here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-vehicle-mod)**.

Full Changes List
=================

### v1.4

1. 🚴 Added fully functionable bicycles, along with new wheel type and locks for them.
2. 🚫 Disabled driving while vehicle is on jack. Fixed collision bugs and wheel rotation issues.
3. 🎨 Fixed absent shading on jack. Vehicles now render properly with shadows when lifted.
4. 🚗 Changed some vehicles models so no player head is seen through the roof.
5. 🚤 Changed Aluminum Boat model, now there is no water inside it when on water.
6. 📦 Bugfix for chest on moped, there is no more duplicating.
7. 🔧 Engine sound fix for vehicles with no fuel or locked with keys. No more engine sound when there is no fuel or no key inserted.
8. 🔊 Fix for sound when installing/removing engine.
9. 🔊 Added engine start/stop sound for non-electric vehicles.
10. 📢 Changed honk logic, added ability to change honk sound for every vehicle in code.
11. ⚙️ Added config param to change if electric motors needs fuel to work.
12. 🎮 Added ability to disable wheelie in config file.
13. 🔊 Changed vehicles sound, now its not that loud.
14. 🎨 Changed textures from "Cray Industries" to "Onysd Industries".
15. 📦 Changed vehicle crate logo.
16. 🔧 Fix for fuel drum top flickering textures.
17. ☕ Added new cup to workstation.
18. 🚤 Added propeller to Aluminum Boat.
19. 🔧 Updated hammer and wrench models and recipes.
20. 🔑 Vehicle pickup is now blocked when holding a key or bicycle lock (prevents interaction conflicts)



### v1.3

1.  💥 Implemented collision system. Now vehicle can push and damage mobs, players and another vehicles.
2.  📋 You can enable/disable collision system, or damage separately for each kind of entities in config file.
3.  ⚙️ Smart Car engine type changed from Electric to Small Engine. Sound changed as well.
4.  🛞 Removed plastic wheels from mod, cause for now they are not used.  
      
    

### v1.2

1.  🇺🇦 Added Ukrainian transaltion.
2.  🔨 Fixed issue when disabled in previous release vehicles still shows in Workstation UI.  
      
    

### v1.1

1.  🚘 Added tow bar for Off-Roader.
2.  ↔️ Changed driver position to left side for Off-Roader, Mini Bus and Golf Cart.
3.  🚫 Disabled some vehicles: Dune Buggy, Shopping Cart, Couch, Bath, Sofacopter.  
      
    

### v1.0

1.  🏍️ Fixed bug with dirt bike colored wheel.
2.  🔑 Finished Key System, now every vehycle can be locked with a key!
3.  📋 Also you can set in config wich kind of vehicles can/not be locked with a key.  
      
    

**Stay tuned for new updates!**
